Class Trigger

java.lang.Object
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.Trigger
public class Trigger extends Component
Represents an invisible rectangular area that performs an action when clicked on. Provides methods for setting actions for different mouse buttons, setting a special cursor that is shown when hovering over the area, and externally registering a click. Can be deactivated to stop performing the actions and showing the special cursor.
See Also:
  • Component
  • MouseButton
  • Cursors

  • Constructor Details

    • Trigger

      public Trigger(int width, int height)
      Constructs an active trigger with the given dimensions.
      Parameters:
      width - the width of the trigger area
      height - the height of the trigger area

  • Method Details

    • click

      public void click(MouseButton mouseButton)
      Registers a click on this trigger. If this trigger is active and the given mouse button has a set action, runs the action.
      Parameters:
      mouseButton - the mouse button that is clicked
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the input mouseButton is null

    • mouseMoveEvent

      public void mouseMoveEvent(int x, int y)
      Updates whether the mouse cursor is hovering over this trigger. If this trigger has a special cursor, is active, and is hovered, sets the mouse cursor to the special cursor.
      Overrides:
      mouseMoveEvent in class Component
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the mouse
      y - the y-coordinate of the mouse

    • mouseClickEvent

      public void mouseClickEvent(int x, int y, MouseButton mouseButton)
      If the clicked coordinates lie on this trigger, calls click(io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.MouseButton) with the clicked mouse button.
      Overrides:
      mouseClickEvent in class Component
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the click
      y - the y-coordinate of the click
      mouseButton - the mouse button that is clicked

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Returns whether this trigger is active.
      Returns:
      whether this trigger is active

    • isHovered

      public boolean isHovered()
      Whether the mouse cursor is currently hovering over this trigger.
      Returns:
      whether the mouse cursor is currently hovering over this trigger

    • getMouseButtonAction

      public Optional<Runnable> getMouseButtonAction(MouseButton mouseButton)
      Returns an Optional containing the action that is run when the given mouse button is clicked, or an empty Optional if no action is run.
      Parameters:
      mouseButton - the mouse button that is clicked
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the action that is run when the given mouse button is clicked, or an empty Optional if no action is run

    • getSpecialCursor

      public Cursor getSpecialCursor()
      Returns the cursor that is shown when hovering over this trigger.
      Returns:
      the cursor that is shown when hovering over this trigger

      public Trigger setActive(boolean active)
      Sets whether this trigger is active.
      Parameters:
      active - whether this trigger is active
      Returns:
      this

    • activate

      public Trigger activate()
      Activates this trigger.
      Returns:
      this

    • deactivate

      public Trigger deactivate()
      Deactivates this trigger.
      Returns:
      this

    • setMouseButtonAction

      public Trigger setMouseButtonAction(MouseButton mouseButton, Runnable action)
      Sets the action that is run when the given mouse button is clicked.
      Parameters:
      mouseButton - the mouse button that is clicked
      action - the action that is run
      Returns:
      this

    • setSpecialCursor

      public Trigger setSpecialCursor(Cursor specialCursor)
      Sets the mouse cursor that is shown when hovering over this trigger.
      Parameters:
      specialCursor - the mouse cursor that is shown
      Returns:
      this

    • removeSpecialCursor

      public Trigger removeSpecialCursor()
      Stops showing the special mouse cursor when hovering over this trigger.
      Returns:
      this
      API Note:
      This method is functionally the same as setSpecialCursor(null). Use this method to improve readability.
